---
title: "Menu buttons (Maximize, minimize, close) not appearing when not in full screen."
date: 2012-12-13
forum: General Help
---

### Post by linuxvstheworld on 2012-12-13
[IMG]http://i.imgur.com/aS65J.png[/IMG]
This issue is in Unity, this has also happened in GNOME classic as well.......

[IMG]http://i.imgur.com/6CFHM.png[/IMG]
[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/data:image/png;base64,[/IMG][IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/data:image/png;base64,[/IMG]

---

### Post by linuxvstheworld on 2012-12-14
Guys, I found out what happened, I accidentally disabled windows decoration in Compiz! If anyone didn't know about this issue either that is how to fix that.

---

### Post by linuxvstheworld on 2012-12-14
I found the problem, and it was Window decoration being toggled off in Compiz. xD

---
